🚀 AI & Robotics Engineer

Mohammad Javad Ahmadi

CTO at MediversAI | Head of ARAS AI Lab

Dual-role executive bridging advanced AI research with commercial impact. 8+ years architecting scalable solutions in MedTech and FinTech with expertise in surgical video analysis, computer vision, and autonomous agentic systems.

GenAI & LLMs

Multi-modal architectures

Full-Stack

SaaS & Cloud systems

Leadership

60+ mentees, product strategy

Explore My WorkDownload CV

About Me

I'm a senior AI engineer and technical leader bridging advanced scientific research with commercial impact.

With 8+ years of experience, I combine the theoretical rigor of academia, the structural standards of industry, and the agility of high-growth startups. My expertise spans:

  • →Advanced AI Architecture: Multi-Modal GenAI (LLMs/VLMs), Autonomous Agentic Systems, Real-time Computer Vision
  • →Product Engineering: Architecting scalable SaaS infrastructure, cloud deployment, CI/CD pipelines
  • →Team Leadership: Mentoring 60+ developers, cross-functional team management, R&D strategy
  • →Domain Expertise: Healthcare AI, Surgical Video Analysis, Medical Imaging, Quantitative Trading

Technical Leadership

Dual-role CTO and Head of AI Lab directing cross-functional teams (AI, Data, Software) delivering scalable SaaS solutions in MedTech and FinTech.

Mentorship & Teaching

Dedicated mentor guiding 67+ researchers with expertise in problem-solving, innovation, and technical excellence across 8+ years.

End-to-End Delivery

Specialist in translating academic research into production-ready products. Successfully launched Surgicise, SmarTeeth, and other award-winning solutions.

Recognition & Awards

Top startup awards (Startup TNT, BioAlberta), prestigious research grants (INSF), and published research in IEEE & JAMA.

8+

Years Experience

67+

Researchers Mentored

17+

Publications

3+

Startups Led

Key Highlights

My core strengths and accomplishments that define my professional journey.

Technical Leadership & Strategy

Dual-role executive (CTO at MediversAI & Head of ARAS AI Group) directing cross-functional teams (AI, Data, Software) to deliver scalable SaaS solutions in MedTech and FinTech.

End-to-End Product Delivery

Specialist in bridging R&D and production; successfully translated academic research into commercial software (Surgicise, SmarTeeth) with pilot programs from major universities and hospitals.

Advanced AI Architecture

8+ years architecting complex pipelines: Multi-Modal GenAI (LLMs/VLMs), Autonomous Agentic Systems, real-time Computer Vision (3D-CNN, Dual-Stream) for mission-critical healthcare applications.

Engineering Leadership

Mentor and Head Teaching Assistant guiding 60+ developers and researchers, fostering technical excellence and innovation across multiple organizations and academic institutions.

Commercial & Academic Recognition

Innovation leader with top-tier startup awards (Startup TNT, BioAlberta), prestigious research grants (INSF), and high-impact publications in IEEE & JAMA.

Proven Track Record

Demonstrated success in commercialization, securing pilot programs with University of Toronto, University of Alberta, and major eye care institutions.

Professional Experience

8+ years bridging advanced AI research with commercial product delivery across MedTech, FinTech, and academic innovation.

Chief Technology Officer (CTO)

MediversAI Inc. (HealthTech SaaS Startup)

Visit
Present

Leading the technological vision and commercialization of AI-driven surgical assessment tools. Translated academic research into a scalable SaaS product.

Key Achievements:

  • Engineered Surgicise - AI-Powered Surgical Skill Assessment SaaS platform
  • Architected full-stack cloud infrastructure for secure deployment
  • Secured pilot programs with University of Toronto, University of Alberta, ARBOR, and EVO
  • Ranked Top 15 at Startup TNT Summit X and Top 8 at BioAlberta's Life Sciences Week

Head of ARAS AI, VR & Software Group

ARAS Lab & Farabi Eye Hospital

Visit
2020 - Present

Directing cross-functional teams (AI, Data, Software) through full product lifecycle. Providing mentorship and strategic direction in developing cutting-edge CV and NLP solutions.

Key Achievements:

  • Led development of Surgical Video Understanding ecosystem with 3,000+ video dataset
  • Architected dual-stream deep learning models for medical imaging (Keratoconus, ROP)
  • Engineered multi-modal GenAI modules for automated adverse event detection
  • Mentored 67+ researchers (10 M.Sc. + 16 current, 19 B.Sc. + 22 current)

Technical Lead - AI & Computer Vision

SmarTeeth & Smartory (MedTech Startup)

Visit
2021 - 2023

Led technical roadmap and engineering of AI-powered dental diagnostic ecosystem. Orchestrated transition from MVP to scalable product.

Key Achievements:

  • Engineered robust deep learning for multi-modal dental imaging analysis
  • Created specialized dataset of 2,000+ Bitewing and X-ray images
  • Integrated LLMs for automated clinical reporting and treatment planning
  • Developed pathology detection for oral lesions, cavities, and structural abnormalities

AI Lead - Financial Forecasting & Agentic Systems

NexolAI (FinTech Startup)

Visit
2022 - Present

Leading R&D of next-generation quantitative trading tools leveraging Transformer-based architectures and Autonomous Agentic workflows.

Key Achievements:

  • Architected Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT) for multi-horizon crypto price forecasting
  • Implemented attention-based feature selection from 100+ technical indicators
  • Pioneered Multi-Agent system for holistic market analysis
  • Orchestrated specialized agents for sentiment, technical, order book, and on-chain analysis

Level Up: CTO Coaching Program Member

Alberta Machine Intelligence Institute (Amii)

Visit
Jan 2025 - Present

Selected for Amii's exclusive executive coaching program for technical leaders of high-potential AI startups.

Key Achievements:

  • Intensive mentorship on transitioning from technical engineering to executive leadership
  • Refining roadmaps for scaling AI infrastructure and teams
  • Participating in exclusive roundtables with world-class AI researchers
  • Discussing cutting-edge GenAI developments and commercial deployment challenges

🏛️ Teaching & Mentorship

  • Instructor: Robotics & Machine Vision (2026)
  • Head Teaching Assistant: ML, Deep Learning, AI, Control Systems
  • Direct Mentor: 67+ researchers across M.Sc. and B.Sc. levels
  • Author: Fundamentals of Robotics, Introduction to Robotics books

📊 Academic Service

  • Reviewer: JAMA, IEEE Transactions (Medical Robotics & Control)
  • Distinguished Reviewer: JAMA Network Open (Sep 2025)
  • Top 5% Peer Reviewer: JAMA Network Open (2024)
  • IT Chair: Robotics Society of Iran & ICRoM Conferences (2022-Present)

Exceptional academic background with advanced degrees in Electrical and Control Engineering from top-tier Iranian institutions.

Key Projects & Products

Breakthrough AI solutions spanning surgical video analysis, medical imaging, fintech, robotics, and innovative training technologies.

Healthcare AI

Surgicise

AI-Powered Surgical Skill Assessment SaaS

Scalable cloud platform for analyzing surgical videos, extracting phase information, segmenting instruments/tissues, and providing AI-driven skill assessments.

Highlights:

  • ✓Research spinoff from ARAS Lab
  • ✓Pilot programs with University of Toronto, University of Alberta, ARBOR, EVO

Tech Stack:

PyTorchTensorFlowDjangoReact+2
Learn More
Surgical AI

Cataract Surgery AI Suite

Multi-Modal Surgical Video Analysis

Advanced deep learning ecosystem for phase recognition, instrument tracking, skill assessment, and adverse event detection in cataract surgery videos.

Highlights:

  • ✓3,000+ proprietary video dataset
  • ✓Dual-stream CNN architecture

Tech Stack:

3D-CNNLLMsVLMsComputer Vision+2
Learn More
Medical Imaging

SmarTeeth

AI-Powered Dental Diagnostic Platform

Multi-modal dental imaging analysis system with segmentation, classification, and automated clinical reporting using deep learning and LLMs.

Highlights:

  • ✓2,000+ annotated dental images
  • ✓Robust pathology detection

Tech Stack:

YOLOSegmentationComputer VisionLLM+2
Learn More
Medical AI

Keratoconus Diagnosis System

AI for Refractive Surgery Decision Support

Dual-stream deep learning framework for precise Keratoconus classification using Pentacam imaging. Provides comprehensive characterization including stage, zone, and clinical recommendations.

Highlights:

  • ✓7,000+ Pentacam images dataset
  • ✓6-class classification accuracy >95%

Tech Stack:

CNNsMedical ImagingComputer VisionWeb Services+1
Learn More
Medical AI

ROP (Retinopathy of Prematurity) AI

Automated Retinal Screening System

Deep learning models for automated diagnosis of plus disease and early ROP stages using fundus imaging, enabling scalable screening in resource-limited settings.

Highlights:

  • ✓3,000+ fundus images dataset
  • ✓Multi-stage ROP characterization

Tech Stack:

Deep LearningMedical ImagingComputer VisionIoT+1
Learn More
FinTech AI

NexolAI - Crypto Trading Intelligence

Autonomous Multi-Agent Market Analyst

Temporal Fusion Transformer for crypto forecasting + Multi-agent system orchestrating sentiment, technical, order book, and on-chain analysis for trading signals.

Highlights:

  • ✓TFT-based architecture for price forecasting
  • ✓Multi-agent LLM orchestration

Tech Stack:

TransformersLangChainLLMsPyTorch+2
Learn More
Training Technology

VR/MR Surgical Simulators

High-Fidelity Training Ecosystems

Mixed reality simulators for cataract and deep vitrectomy surgeries, integrated with gamified physical phantoms and AI video analysis for objective assessment.

Highlights:

  • ✓Patent-pending physical training kit
  • ✓Gamification mechanics

Tech Stack:

VR/MRUnity/UnrealAIRobotics+2
Learn More
Medical Robotics

Surgical Robotics Data Platform

RCM-Based Real-Time Data Logging

Integrated GUI and real-time data acquisition system for robotic surgery, capturing force/motion dynamics and enabling comprehensive robotic surgery analysis.

Highlights:

  • ✓Real-time telemetry capture
  • ✓GUI integration with surgical robots

Tech Stack:

C++ROSReal-time SystemsQt+2

Teaching Philosophy

I believe in hands-on, project-based learning that bridges theory and practice. My mentorship focuses on developing independent problem-solvers, critical thinkers, and innovation leaders. I emphasize not just technical skills, but also communication, collaboration, and ethical responsibility in AI and engineering.

Research Grants & Funding

Secured prestigious research grants and funding from premier national and international institutions, totaling millions in research investment.

Design and Implementation of an Explainable AI (XAI) System for Cataract Surgery Video Analysis

Active

The Vice-Presidency for Science, Technology and Knowledge Based Economy

Research Focus Areas

Surgical AI & Computer Vision

Advanced deep learning for surgical video analysis, instrument tracking, skill assessment, and adverse event detection.

→Cataract Surgery Analysis
→Vitrectomy Assessment
→Surgical Simulator Integration

Medical Imaging & Diagnostics

AI-driven diagnostic systems for ophthalmology, dental imaging, and general medical imaging.

→Keratoconus Detection
→ROP Analysis
→Dental AI
→Brain Lesion Detection

Robotics & Medical Robotics

Robotic surgery platforms, haptic feedback systems, and robotic skill assessment.

→RCM-Based Surgery
→Haptic Training Systems
→Surgical Robotics Data Platforms

Training & Simulation Technology

VR/MR surgical simulators, gamification, and objective skill assessment systems.

→Cataract Surgery Simulator
→Vitrectomy Simulator
→Gamified Physical Phantoms
